data.title: Ferreycorp : Sales and profits surged, margins improved, and dividends hit policy limits amid strong demand
data.description:
Sales rose 18% year-over-year to US$592 million, with net profit up 36% to S/166 million. Operational efficiency improved, SG&A expenses fell, and adjusted margins remained strong. Dividend payments reached S/288.3 million, and business confidence increased amid Peru's improved macroeconomic outlook.

Original document: Ferreycorp SAA [FERREYC1] Slides Release — Jul. 24 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-generated summary and may contain inaccuracies. Please verify any important information with the original source.

data.title: REG - Truetide PLC - Result of AGM
data.description:
RNS Number : 8309N Truetide PLC 24 July 2026  

24 July 2026

Truetide plc

("Truetide", the "Company" or the "Group")

Result of Annual General Meeting

Truetide plc (AIM: TRUE) is pleased to announce that all resolutions proposed to shareholders at the Company's AGM held earlier today were duly passed. The Board notes the voting in relation to resolutions 7 and 8 and is committed to continuing an open dialogue with the Company's shareholders. Following the voting at the AGM, where it is able to, the Board will seek to engage with those shareholders who are understood to have voted against resolutions 7 and 8 to understand their views and/or any specific concerns.

The table below shows the total votes cast in respect of each resolution.

data.title: Fiserv Is Maintained at Hold by Truist Securities
Container Corp of India Posts June-Qtr Consol Net Profit 2.67 Billion Rupees
Ferreycorp : Strong sales and profit growth in 2Q 2026, aided by one-time gains and robust machinery demand
data.description:
Sales and net profit surged in 2Q 2026, driven by strong machinery demand and a one-time recovery at Trex Chile. Margins declined due to sales mix and FX volatility, but operating efficiency improved. Inventory buildup supports future growth.

Original document: Ferreycorp SAA [FERREYC1] Earnings Release — Jul. 24 2026

data.title: REG - EnQuest PLC - Publication of a Prospectus
data.description:
RNS Number : 8307N EnQuest PLC 24 July 2026  

THIS IS AN ANNOUNCEMENT AND NOT A CIRCULAR OR PROSPECTUS AND INVESTORS SHOULD NOT MAKE ANY INVESTMENT DECISION ON THE BASIS OF ITS CONTENTS. A COMBINED CIRCULAR AND PROSPECTUS IN RELATION TO THE PROPOSED ACQUISITIONS DESCRIBED IN THIS ANNOUNCEMENT WILL BE PUBLISHED IN DUE COURSE. FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

24 July 2026

EnQuest PLC

("EnQuest", "the Company" or "the Group")

Publication of combined Circular and Prospectus and Notice of General Meeting

Further to the announcement made on 10 June 2026 (the "FOA Announcement") and the update announcement made on 10 July 2026 regarding the pre-emption rights in relation to Package 2, EnQuest is pleased to announce that it has today, following receipt of approval from the Financial Conduct Authority (the "FCA"), published a combined prospectus and shareholder circular (the "Prospectus") in relation to the proposed acquisitions of participating interests in four production sharing contracts in Malaysia from PETRONAS CARIGALI SDN. BHD. ("CARIGALI") for a maximum total consideration of US$833 million, subject to the Approval Conditions set out in the FOA Announcement (together the "Proposed Acquisitions").

The Prospectus will be posted to shareholders today and is available to view on EnQuest's website at https://www.enquest.com/investors/shareholder-information/malaysia-acquisition. A copy of the Prospectus will be submitted to the National Storage Mechanism and will also be available for inspection at https://data.fca.org.uk/#/nsm/nationalstoragemechanism. A general meeting of EnQuest's shareholders will be held at 9.00a.m. on 11 August 2026 (the "General Meeting") to consider and approve the Proposed Acquisitions. Full details and joining instructions are set out in the Notice of the General Meeting contained in the Prospectus.

The Proposed Acquisitions, should they complete, will together constitute a reverse takeover for the purposes of the UK Listing Rules of the FCA (the "UKLRs"). In addition, the acquisition of Package 1 alone (regardless of whether the acquisitions of Package 2 or Package 3 complete) constitutes a reverse takeover under the UKLRs. Therefore, the admission of the entire issued share capital of EnQuest ("Ordinary Shares") to the Equity Shares (Commercial Companies) ("ESCC") category of the Official List of the FCA and to trading on London Stock Exchange plc's main market for listed securities (the "Main Market") will be cancelled following Completion of the acquisition of Package 1, regardless of whether the acquisitions of Package 2 and Package 3 are completed. Provided completion in respect of Package 1 occurs, the Ordinary Shares are expected to be subsequently re-admitted to the ESCC category of the Official List of the FCA and to trading on the Main Market (together, "Re-admission") at 8.00am on the business day following Completion, expected to be on or around 4 January 2027.

The Company is not offering any new Ordinary Shares nor any other securities in connection with the Proposed Acquisitions. Following Re-admission, the Ordinary Shares will continue to be registered with their existing ISIN of: GB00B635TG28 and the Company's ticker symbol will continue to be ENQ on the Main Market.

Unless otherwise defined, all definitions used in this announcement have the same meanings as described in the Company's FOA Announcement on 10 June 2026.

Contacts:

EnQuest PLC

Tel: +44 (0)20 7925 4900

Amjad Bseisu (Chief Executive Officer)

Jonathan Copus (Chief Financial Officer)

Craig Baxter (Head of Investor Relations and Corporate Affairs)

Peel Hunt LLP (Sponsor)

Tel: +44 (0)20 7418 8900

David McKeown

Richard Crichton

Georgia Langoulant

Teneo

Tel: +44 (0)20 7353 4200

Martin Robinson

Harry Cameron

Notes to editors

EnQuest is unlocking value from energy assets. Responsibly. As an independent energy company with operations in the UK North Sea and across South East Asia, the EnQuest Group's strategic vision is to lead as a safe, efficient operator of mature and underinvested oil and gas assets; sustainably extending field lives and delivering superior value across the asset lifecycle, as part of a just energy transition.

EnQuest PLC trades on the London Stock Exchange.

Please visit our website www.EnQuest.com for more information on our global operations

Forward-looking statements: This announcement may contain certain forward-looking statements with respect to EnQuest's expectations and plans, strategy, management's objectives, future performance, production, reserves, costs, revenues and other trend information. These statements and forecasts involve risk and uncertainty because they relate to events and depend upon circumstances that may occur in the future. There are a number of factors which could cause actual results or developments to differ materially from those expressed or implied by these forward-looking statements and forecasts. The statements have been made with reference to forecast price changes, economic conditions and the current regulatory environment. Nothing in this announcement should be construed as a profit forecast or estimate and no statement in this announcement should be interpreted to mean that earnings, earnings per share or income, cash flow from operations or free cash flow for the EnQuest Group or the Enlarged Group, as appropriate, for the current or future years would necessarily match or exceed the amount set out in any forward-looking statement or historical published earnings, earnings per share or income, cash flow from operations or free cash flow for the EnQuest Group or the Enlarged Group, as appropriate. Past share performance cannot be relied upon as a guide to future performance.

Important Notices: Peel Hunt LLP ("Peel Hunt"), which is authorised and regulated in the United Kingdom by the FCA, is acting exclusively for the Company as Sponsor and no one else in connection with the Proposed Acquisitions and it will not regard any other person as a client in relation to the Proposed Acquisitions and neither Peel Hunt nor any of its affiliates (nor any of their partners, directors, officers, employees, advisers or agents) will be responsible to anyone other than the Company for providing the protections afforded to its clients or for providing advice in relation to the Proposed Acquisitions or any other transaction, matter, or arrangement referred to in this announcement.

This announcement has been issued by, and is the sole responsibility of, the Company. data.title: BTCC Exchange Closes World Cup Showdown with Over 80,000 Participants and 22% Trading Volume Surge
data.description:
George Town, Cayman Islands, July 24th, 2026, Chainwire

BTCC, the world's longest-serving cryptocurrency exchange and an official regional sponsor of the Argentine Football Association (AFA), marked the close of its 15 Years in the Game: The BTCC World Cup Showdown on July 21, 2026.

The campaign drew more than 80,000 participants and ran through every match of Argentina's 2026 World Cup knockout journey, rewarding traders who timed their activity around the national team's biggest games.

Campaign Trading Volume

Across the full campaign period, BTCC recorded a 22% increase in futures trading volume compared with pre-campaign levels. The gain traces directly to the platform's 1.25x volume boost during the 24-hour window before each Argentina match kicked off. For traders, the boost gives them another opportunity to climb the weekly and overall leaderboards.

Group Stage

On June 15, 2026, ahead of Argentina's match against Algeria, daily futures trading volume reached approximately $2.84 billion, about 15% above the average of surrounding days. Six days later, ahead of the Argentina vs. Austria match on June 21, volume climbed to approximately $2.35 billion, a 55% jump from the previous day.

Knockout Stage

BTCC's 1.25x volume boost carried through all five of Argentina's knockout matches, with three outperforming the campaign's July daily average.

  • Round of 32 (July 3): Pre-match volume (vs. Cabo Verde) hit $2.58 billion, 13.6% above the July average.
  • Round of 16 (July 7): Pre-match volume reached $2.58 billion, 13.2% above average.
  • Quarterfinal (July 11): Volume held at $1.75 billion, a quieter stretch ahead of the semi-final push.
  • Semi-final (July 15): Pre-match volume climbed to $2.56 billion, a 12.4% edge over average.
  • Final (July 19): Pre-match volume hit $1.59 billion, a 20% jump over the prior day and the campaign's largest single-day gain.

Prizes Now Being Distributed

The 690,000 USDT leaderboard prize pool and lucky draw prizes, including a signed Argentina jersey, a Miami yacht getaway, and a Hublot Spirit of Big Bang Titanium watch, are now being distributed. Participants can find details on prize distribution on the campaign page.

Argentina's World Cup Journey

Behind the numbers was one of the most captivating World Cups in recent memory. Argentina advanced from the group stage through five knockout rounds, delivering the kind of extended, high-stakes competition that kept traders engaged match after match.

The team also produced individual milestones. Lionel Messi departs the tournament as the second all-time leading World Cup scorer with 21 goals. He is the only player to score in six consecutive knockout matches and was named Silver Ball winner for the World Cup 2026.

For BTCC, the World Cup matches offered a natural rhythm for its trading campaign, one boost window for every Argentina match, all the way to the Final.

Winning Messi-Signed Jerseys on X

The excitement doesn’t end despite the World Cup 2026 now being over. As part of its 15th anniversary celebrations, BTCC will keep the spirit of the championship alive with a series of Lionel Messi-signed jersey giveaways on its official X account throughout 2026.

#BTCC15 | #BTCCxArgentineFA | #BuiltForChampions

About BTCC

Founded in 2011, BTCC is a leading global cryptocurrency exchange serving over 12 million users across 100+ countries. As the official regional sponsor of the Argentine Football Association (AFA) and with NBA All-Star Jaren Jackson Jr. as its global brand ambassador, BTCC offers secure and accessible cryptocurrency trading services, focused on delivering a user-friendly experience while adhering to applicable regulatory standards.

Official website: https://www.btcc.com/en-US

X: https://x.com/BTCCexchange

Contact

Aaryn Ling

press@btcc.com

data.description:

Management maintains guidance for stable or higher net sales and margins, supported by a robust backlog and strong demand in key segments.

data.title: Meta launches new app 'Seller' to provide sales tools for merchants
Gentex Q2 sales miss on lower light vehicle production
Liberty Global Ltd. Q2 2026: Revenue $1172M, Net loss $357.8M — 10-Q Summary
data.description:
Liberty Global Ltd. reported second-quarter 2026 results with revenue of $1172M, down from $1269.1M a year earlier, and a net loss of $357.8M versus a net loss of $2773.8M in Q2 2025.

Financial Highlights

  • Revenue was $1,172.0M for Q2 2026, compared with $1,269.1M in Q2 2025; YoY change (7.7%).
  • Net income (loss) was a net loss of $357.8M for Q2 2026, improved from a net loss of $2,773.8M in Q2 2025.
  • Diluted earnings per share: Not reported for the quarter in Part I, Item 2; omitted per filing.

Business Highlights

  • Revenue trends: Consolidated revenue was modestly down in Q2 (−7.7%) but essentially flat year-to-date (+0.3%); organic declines were 6.0% in Q2 and 1.5% year-to-date.
  • Channel & product mix: Broadband subscription growth in the quarter and year-to-date offset declines in video and fixed-line driven by ARPU and customer mix shifts.
  • Operational scale: At June 30, 2026, networks passed approximately 29.2M homes, with about 10.9M fixed customers and roughly 48.4M mobile subscribers.
  • Brand & commercial momentum: Telenet showed improving Adjusted EBITDA margin and broadband strength; Wyre and VM Ireland remained stable with targeted cost and service measures.
  • Cost & service initiatives: Ongoing network upgrades, expanded CPE deployments and cost-reduction actions including restructuring and program/content optimization continue to be priorities.

Original SEC Filing: Liberty Global Ltd. [ LBTYA ] - 10-Q - Jul. 24, 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-powered summary. It may contain inaccuracies. Consider verifying important information with the source. Please note this summary is solely based on documents filed with the SEC.

data.title: APARINDS: Record revenue and profit growth driven by premium mix and strong execution across divisions
data.description:
Revenue grew 29.1% year-over-year to INR 6,591 crore, with EBITDA up 62.7% and PAT up 77.7%. All divisions increased profitability, achieving record-high quarterly sales and profit despite external disruptions. Premium product mix and major export orders drove performance.
